title: cynoglossum micranthum
intro: Cynoglossum micranthum, also known as small-flowered hound's tongue, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Cynoglossum micranthum are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
